_comment: Editorial scorecards for four delivery-pillar indicators whose underlying data is political commitments rather than machine-readable series. Each value is an editorial interpretation of published announcements (gov.uk press releases, select-committee evidence, departmental annual reports) scored as percent-of-target-milestones-hit. The shipped values are refreshed whenever the underlying departmental announcements move, typically quarterly. The adapter enforces a 90-day freshness guard so a missed refresh surfaces in /admin/health. Every entry cites its primary source URL; the full provenance breakdown for each milestone lives in docs/DELIVERY_METHODOLOGY.md. 2026-07-03 revisit (RUNBOOK §7: bump observed_at even when the assessment is unchanged, to record that it was reviewed): all four values held after reviewing departmental announcements since 2026-04-17; citations refreshed for New Towns (consultation closed 19 May 2026) and SMR (Wylfa confirmed as first UK site, 13 April 2026 GBE-Nuclear/Rolls-Royce contract).

new_towns_milestones.source_label: MHCLG New Towns Draft Programme consultation (ran 23 March – 19 May 2026); final locations and full government response to the New Towns Taskforce expected later summer 2026
new_towns_milestones.methodology: 3 of 7 shortlisted sites at planning-consent stage, 2 at outline-design, 2 at pre-scoping. Weighted by published target dates. Held at 68.0 on 2026-07-03: seven sites remain the confirmed shortlist and the consultation has closed, but final designations are still pending (no milestone advance since the April review).

bics_rollout.source_label: DESNZ BICS quarterly onboarding report, Q1 2026
bics_rollout.methodology: 8,140 firms onboarded against a 10,000-firm end-2026 target. Percent = actual / target. Held at 81.4 on 2026-07-03: no newer DESNZ onboarding report published since the Q1 2026 report reviewed in April.

industrial_strategy.source_label: DBT Industrial Strategy delivery dashboard, Q1 2026 quarterly update (published 9 April 2026)
industrial_strategy.methodology: Weighted mean of milestones tagged on-track (100), slipping (50), or missed (0) across the five published strategy pillars. Held at 74.0 on 2026-07-03: the 9 April 2026 (Q1 2026) quarterly update is the latest; the next quarterly update was not yet published at revisit.

smr_programme.source_label: Great British Energy – Nuclear / Rolls-Royce SMR contract, 13 April 2026 (Wylfa, Ynys Môn confirmed as first UK SMR site)
smr_programme.methodology: Rolls-Royce SMR selected as sole vendor; Wylfa confirmed as first UK site and a site-specific design contract signed (April 2026, up to £599m from the National Wealth Fund). Weighted against published milestones for 2030 first-steel. Held at 62.0 on 2026-07-03: the design-contract/site-confirmation milestone is a genuine step, but the major delivery milestones are unchanged — final investment decision is still expected 2029 and first-steel 2030.

release_schedule: Refreshed quarterly or on major departmental announcement.
